headline: Is Starboard’s Board Push Reshaping the Operational Investment Case For CarMax (KMX)?
summary: On March 11, 2026, activist investor Starboard Value LP disclosed that it had nominated Jeffrey C. Smith and William C. Cobb to CarMax’s board for election at the 2026 annual meeting, pressing the company and incoming CEO Keith Barr to accelerate operational improvements in areas such as customer experience, refurbishment, costs, and pricing. The company’s decision to review Starboard’s proposal while remaining in constructive discussions highlights how governance changes and outside...

headline: A Look At CarMax (KMX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Mixed Performance
summary: What CarMax’s Recent Share Performance Tells Investors CarMax (KMX) has been back in focus after a recent 1 day share price decline of about 1.2%, alongside mixed shorter term moves, a small gain over the past week and a decline over the past month. Over the past 3 months, the stock shows a positive return, while the past year total return sits around a 43.1% decline. This puts recent trading in context for investors assessing used vehicle retail exposure. See our latest analysis for...
